sections.plan2: INS: Benefit Setup — Plan 2 Self-Insured Full Coverage
sections.plan3: INS: Benefit Setup — Plan 3 Select Health

phase2.title: Fix Issues and Roll Forward to {taxYear}
phase2.description: Resolve any issues found in Phase 1 and update WinTeam settings for the new tax year.

phase3.title: {taxYear} Data Catch-Up
phase3.description: Enter all {taxYear} employee data, benefit elections, and dependent information into WinTeam.

phase4.title: Generate, Verify, and File
phase4.description: Generate the {taxYear} 1095-C forms in WinTeam, verify the codes are correct, and submit electronically.

sections.benefitsByEmployee: INS: Benefits by Employee — Self-Insured Plans

wizard.title: Code Lookup Wizard
wizard.subtitle: Determine the correct Lines 14, 15, and 16 codes for any employee situation
wizard.step1Question: Was this employee a full-time employee during this month?
wizard.step1OptionNo: No — part-time or variable hour employee
wizard.step2Question: Was the employee offered health coverage this month?
wizard.step2OptionYes: Yes — coverage was offered for the entire month
wizard.step2OptionWaiting: No — employee was in a waiting period or hired mid-month
wizard.step2OptionNo: No — no offer was made this month
wizard.step3Question: Which plan was offered to this employee?
wizard.step3OptionP1: Plan 1 — MEC only (self-insured, does NOT meet minimum value)
wizard.step3OptionP2: Plan 2 — Self-Insured Full Coverage (meets minimum value)
wizard.step3OptionP3: Plan 3 — Select Health Small Group (meets minimum value)
wizard.step4Question: Who was the coverage offered to?
wizard.step5Question: Did the employee actually enroll in the coverage that was offered?
wizard.step5OptionYes: Yes — enrolled in the coverage offered
wizard.part3Required: Required — enter all covered individuals in INS: Benefits by Employee
wizard.part3NotRequired: Not required — Select Health issues the 1095-B
wizard.affordabilityFail: Fails affordability test — review coverage cost

tracker.title: Employee Tracker
tracker.subtitle: Track 1095-C compliance status for all employees

modals.deleteConfirm: Delete this employee? Their data will be permanently removed.

guide.title: WinTeam Setup Guide
guide.subtitle: Step-by-step configuration reference for all three plans
guide.importantNote: Because RBM Services offers all three plans to every eligible employee, every employee benefit package in WinTeam must include all three plans — not just the one the employee enrolled in. WinTeam derives the Line 14 code from the package, so if only Plan 1 (MEC) is in the package, WinTeam will generate 1F instead of 1E. This is the most common setup error.

steps.step1Sub: Done once. Applies to all three plans.
steps.step2Sub: Done once per eligibility rule. Controls who gets a 1095-C generated.
steps.step3Sub: Configure each plan separately. This is where the three plans diverge.
steps.step4Sub: Done per employee. This is where coverage becomes personal.

guide.dataSourceSubtitle: Where every 1095-C field comes from in WinTeam

checklist.title: Pay Period Checklist
checklist.subtitle: Complete these tasks every pay period (1st and 15th)

offers.title: Offer Letters
offers.subtitle: Manage benefit offers for newly eligible employees

issues.title: Filing Issues
issues.subtitle: Issues found during the filing process

access.title: Access Plan
access.subtitle: Review who needs what WinTeam access before starting the {taxYear} filing process

roleDescriptions.standard_hr: Basic HR staff with access to view and edit employee records, enter hours, and manage benefit enrollments in INS: Benefits by Employee. Cannot access SYS: Company Setup or INS: Benefit Setup.
roleDescriptions.hr_manager: HR staff with elevated access to run 1095-C reports, execute the Eligibility Testing Wizard, view and edit benefit packages, and access most INS screens. Cannot access SYS.
roleDescriptions.winteam_admin: Full system access including SYS: Company Setup, INS: Benefit Setup, and all configuration screens. Typically the person who manages your WinTeam system. There may only be one or two people with this role.
roleDescriptions.team_software_support: Tasks that require involvement from TEAM Software directly — either because they require backend access or because the risk of error is high enough that professional support is recommended.

access.preChecklistSubtitle: Complete this checklist before starting Phase 1

checkItems.adminAccess: WinTeam Administrator has access to: SYS: Company Setup, INS: Benefit Setup, INS: Eligibility Setup, INS: Eligibility Testing Wizard, INS: Employee 1095-C Report (Electronic File)
checkItems.managerAccess: HR Manager has access to: INS: Employee 1095-C Report (Preview/Print), INS: Benefits by Employee (Read/Write), Employee Master File (Read/Write)
checkItems.staffIdentified: HR Staff identified for data entry: _______________
checkItems.staffAccess: HR Staff have access to: INS: Benefits by Employee (Read/Write), Employee Master File (Read/Write)
checkItems.tccLocated: TCC (Transmitter Control Code) located — Stored at: _______________
checkItems.fireCredentials: FIRE system credentials located — Held by: _______________
checkItems.teamSoftware: TEAM Software e-file portal credentials (if using their service) — Held by: _______________

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Company-wide ACA configuration

fields.mecPremiumHelper: This amount appears on Line 15 of every employee's 1095-C regardless of which plan they enrolled in.
fields.extensionFiled: Extension filed for this tax year (deadline moves to April 30)

safeHarborOptions.rate_of_pay: Rate of Pay (2H) — Recommended for hourly workers

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: Manage users, view activity, and configure access

users.changeRoleDescription: Admins can manage users and settings. HR Users can use all filing features.
users.removeConfirmDescription: They will immediately lose access to the app. Their checklist progress and filing data will be preserved for audit purposes. This cannot be undone.
users.cannotModifySelf: You cannot modify your own account

invite.title: Invite a Team Member
invite.subtitle: They will receive an email to set their password and access the app

roleOptions.hr_user: HR User — can use all filing features and view all data
roleOptions.admin: Admin — can also manage users, settings, and delete data

invite.successDescription: They will receive an email with a link to set their password and access the app.
invite.emailAlreadyExists: This email already has an account
invite.inviteFailed: Failed to send invitation. Please try again.

screenshots.title: Screenshots — What it should look like
screenshots.subtitle: Upload screenshots as you complete this step. They become permanent visual guides for your team.
screenshots.uploadArea: Drag a screenshot here, or click to browse
screenshots.uploadFormats: JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF · Max 5MB
screenshots.captionPlaceholder: Describe what this screenshot shows — e.g. 'Self Insured checkbox correctly checked'
screenshots.deleteConfirm: Delete this screenshot? This cannot be undone.
screenshots.maxReached: Maximum 10 screenshots reached. Delete one to add more.
screenshots.noScreenshotsDescription: Be the first to capture this step — upload a screenshot while you are working through it and your team will have a visual guide going forward.
